description: As an IT Operations Manager, process end-of-life hardware disposition. Create two new status labels: 'Pending E-Waste' (Type: Undeployable) and 'Donated' (Type: Archived). Update all 'Retired' assets in the 'Laptops' category to the 'Pending E-Waste' status. For all 'Retired' assets in the 'Tablets' category, change their status to 'Donated' and update their Notes field to 'Donated to Lincoln High School'. Do not modify active equipment or other retired equipment.
